description: GIVEN a user (paid/free/anonymous) has launched the MLB app

steps.action: WHEN the user selects a VOD to watch
steps.result:
THEN initPlaybackSession is called via a graphql network call
AND the video player goes full screen
AND playback starts from the beginning
AND the content title displays left justified above the scrubber bar
AND the playhead displays far left on the scrubber bar
AND the entire scrubber bar is gray
AND the scrubber bar turns blue to the left of the playhead as playback progresses
AND the "Jump to Live" button does not display
AND the "CC" button displays right justified above the scrubber bar
AND <elapsed_time>/<total_run_time> displays right justified below the scrubber bar
AND the <elapsed_time> value increases as playback continues
